reason: Backend guideline entry point for cool-admin/Midway implementation context.
Backend module layout guidance for platform, merchant, consumer API, tenant, order, and plugin domains.
Database and ORM guidance for tenant_id isolation, TypeORM entities, migrations, and query constraints.
Backend error handling expectations for auth, tenant isolation, payment, fulfillment, and plugin failures.
Logging guidance for tenant-aware auditability and operational debugging.
Backend quality gates and forbidden patterns for implementation.
Frontend guideline entry point for uni-app and admin UI implementation context.
Frontend layout guidance for C-side uni-app and admin/B-side surfaces.
Component design guidance for reusable product, cart, order, and rental UI components.
Composable/hook guidance for API access, tenant context, and cross-page state.
State guidance for tenant-scoped cart, user session, order flow, and UI state.
Type safety guidance for API contracts, order models, and rental/retail product types.
Frontend quality gates and forbidden patterns for implementation.
Cross-layer data flow guidance for product, order, tenant, payment, and plugin flows.
Reuse guidance before creating shared tenant/order/product/plugin utilities.
Primary backend platform decision: cool-admin v8 multi-tenant behavior, constraints, and risks.
Plugin lifecycle, install/uninstall, Midway mapping, and mini-program runtime constraints.
C-side frontend stack decision: uni-app Vue3, wot-design-uni, Pinia, and tenant headers.
Framework comparison history and rationale for rejecting the earlier NestJS approach.
ORM/database comparison history and rationale for TypeORM/PostgreSQL direction.
PR-by-PR breakdown: scope, dependencies, acceptance, agent assignment — authoritative roadmap for every PR.
Order model (main table + item-level type + rental subtable) and dual-layer state machine for retail+rental — core for PR3/PR5/PR7.
WeChat service-provider split-pay + prepaid deposit + independent fund ledger — core for PR6; tenant=sub_mchid callback resolution.
C-side MP-only scope, admin dual-brand build, 5 frontend gotchas (router glob/plugins, X-Tenant-Id, eps path, repo name) — core for C/admin PRs.
